name: GT-idempotence-inheritance
source: Prior VALIDATED registry lemma lem-idempotence-inheritance (proofs/lem-idempotence-inheritance/, af: validated; status proved). CONTRACT: For a unital order-isometric Jordan embedding j (so ||jM||=||M|| and ||j||_op=1) and a unital positive C, with Phi=Cj and F=jC, the operator-norm idempotency defects satisfy ||Phi^2-Phi|| <= ||F^2-F||; hence ||F^2-F|| <= eta < 1/4 forces ||Phi^2-Phi|| <= eta < 1/4, so P=theta(2Phi-1) is well-defined. (Imported as a black-box validated lemma; no refs quote needed.)
